title: CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES INC CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides civil legal aid and advocacy, can not assist with criminal law cases. Organized into specialty units: Housing/Consumer Unit, Income Maintenance Unit, Employment/Individual Rights Unit (Immigration Law Project, Protecting Our Veterans, and Public Guardian Program), and Family Unit. 225 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Low-income households (125% of the Federal Poverty Level), age 60 and older, and veterans. Specialty units may have additional eligibility requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm (541) 779-7292 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-7292 Alternate (541) 779-7000 Age 60 and older Message Phone (541) 779-7291 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must complete an application. Visit website or call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application and supporting documents (which may include: court paperwork, rental agreement and all written notices, letters from SSI, etc.) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Elder Law General Legal Aid Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Labor and Employment Law If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES INC
